problem.title: Text Justification
problem.description: Given an array of strings words and a width maxWidth, format the text such that each line has exactly maxWidth characters and is fully (left and right) justified.
assumptions: Extra spaces distributed left to right.
Last line is left-justified (spaces only at right).

example.explanation: Each line has exactly maxWidth chars. Distribute spaces evenly; last line is left-justified.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Greedy
solutions.description: A greedy pass first determines how many words fit on each line (the standard bin-packing greedy), then distributes the remaining whitespace evenly between gaps, giving one extra space to the leftmost gaps when the spaces don't divide evenly. The last line and single-word lines are left-justified with trailing spaces. The key insight is that distributing extra spaces left-to-right by using modulo arithmetic requires no auxiliary storage beyond a string builder.
solutions.code_python:
from typing import List

def full_justify(words: List[str], max_width: int) -> List[str]:
    result: List[str] = []
    i = 0

    while i < len(words):
        # Greedily pack words onto the current line
        j, line_len = i, 0
        while j < len(words) and line_len + len(words[j]) + (j - i) <= max_width:
            line_len += len(words[j])
            j += 1

        spaces_needed = max_width - line_len
        num_words = j - i

        if j == len(words) or num_words == 1:
            # Last line or single-word line: left-justify
            line = ' '.join(words[i:j])
            line += ' ' * (max_width - len(line))
        else:
            gaps = num_words - 1
            space_per_gap, extra = divmod(spaces_needed, gaps)
            line = ''
            for k in range(i, j - 1):
                line += words[k]
                line += ' ' * (space_per_gap + (1 if extra > 0 else 0))
                extra -= 1
            line += words[j - 1]  # last word in line — no trailing spaces

        result.append(line)
        i = j

    return result
